content: Vortex: Install Manager extracts archives into per-mod Staging Folder; Deployment engine links staging files into game dir via IDeploymentMethod (pluggable activators). Hardlink (preferred: native perf, zero extra space, requires same partition), Symlink (cross-drive, Windows needs dev-mode/admin), Move/copy fallback (FAT32/network). Manifest __vortex_deployment.json records every deployed file + source mod + hash/timestamp + method + instance id. Deploy: lock -> checkForExternalChanges -> sort by load order/rules -> clear obsolete links -> per-mod activation -> write manifest. Purge: consult manifest, delete only managed files, staging untouched = exact reversal. Conflict winner decided by load order in LinkingDeployment.
